name: stackra/platform-user
purpose: Central-plane platform staff principal — the platform_admin-guarded PlatformUser + PlatformProfile pair consumed by the admin console surface.
capabilities: PlatformUser Eloquent model on the platform_admin guard
No tenant_id / application_id — cross-cutting by design
when_to_use: Provisioning Stackra internal staff for the central-admin surface (support, ops, engineering).
when_not_to_use: For tenant-audience users (per-Application), reach for the sibling stackra/user package.
